core_mechanism: Reduction of a noisy spatially-extended (field) dynamics to a one-dimensional biased random walk of a collective coordinate by projecting the fluctuations onto the system's translational zero (adjoint Goldstone) mode, with a thermodynamic-uncertainty-type bound linking that coordinate's positional diffusion to the entropy production of the motion
brief_reason: The abstract states the bound follows by projecting noisy field dynamics onto the adjoint translational mode, which maps the wave position to an effective biased random walk whose diffusion is bounded by the dissipation associated with propagation.
